title: bolbostemma biglandulosum var. biglandulosum
intro: Bolbostemma biglandulosum var. biglandulosum, also known as the Chinese lesser burdock, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Celastraceae. It is used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving digestion, making it a valuable herb in treating various ailments. Bolbostemma biglandulosum var. biglandulosum is often used in herbal preparations, including decoctions, infusions, and capsules, to promote overall health and well-being.
